data.title: 9F Inc. receives Nasdaq non-compliance notice
data.description:
• 9F Inc. (NASDAQ:JFU) received a Nasdaq notice on May 23, 2025, for failing to file its 2024 annual report on time.
  • The company is not in compliance with Nasdaq.
  • 9F has 60 days to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq.
  • If accepted, Nasdaq may grant an extension until November 11, 2025, to regain compliance.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: California probes Paramount's $15M Trump settlement offer
data.description:
Shares of Paramount Global (NASDAQ:PARA) (NASDAQ:PARAA) were under pressure Friday afternoon in the wake of a report that California’s State Senate was investigating the company for bribery and engaging in unfair competition.

According to Semafor, the investigation revolves around Paramount’s (NASDAQ:PARA) (NASDAQ:PARAA) $15M offer to the Trump campaign to settle a lawsuit against CBS pertaining to an edited 60 Minutes interview in October with former Vice President Kamala Harris.  

According to The Wall Street Journal, Trump turned down the $15M offer, instead seeking a settlement of $25M and a public apology from the network.

The inquiry seeks to find out if Paramount (NASDAQ:PARA) (NASDAQ:PARAA) acted out of legal necessity or due to fears that Trump will use his authority to block Paramount’s (PARA) (PARAA) pending merger with Skydance Media.

“If Paramount is entertaining settlement primarily to secure favorable regulatory treatment, this raises deeply troubling implications not just for journalism, but for the rule of law and the integrity of corporate governance,” California State Senators Josh Becker and Thomas Umberg said in a  letter to former CBS executives Bill Owens and Wendy McMahon.

By engaging in bribery, the inquiry suggests Paramount (PARA) (PARAA) breached fiduciary duties owed by board members to its shareholders, misused corporate funds, or violated federal anti-bribery laws and California’s Unfair Competition law.

As a result of the inquiry, Paramount (PARA) (PARAA) shares slipped into the red ahead of Friday’s close.

Dear readers: We recognize that politics often intersects with the financial news of the day, so we invite you to click here to join the separate political discussion.

data.title: ContextLogic to voluntarily delist from Nasdaq, move to OTCQB Market
data.description:
• ContextLogic (NASDAQ:LOGC) will voluntarily delist from Nasdaq after markets close on June 2, 2025.
  • The company’s shares will begin trading on the OTCQB Venture Market on June 3, 2025, under the same ticker symbol “LOGC.”
  • A Form 25 will be filed with the SEC around June 9, 2025, with delisting expected to take effect 10 days later.
  • Nasdaq previously challenged ContextLogic’s listing status, labeling it a “public shell.”
  • Following a hearing, the Board opted to delist, citing cost savings, reduced regulatory burden, and strategic flexibility.
  • LOGC shares down 23% post-market on Friday.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Mangoceuticals files to sell 4.46M shares of common stock by selling shareholders
data.description:
• Mangoceuticals (MGRX) filed a prospectus to resale 4.46M shares of common stock.
  • The company will not receive any proceeds from the sale of ordinary shares by the selling shareholder.
  • This prospectus is not an offer to sell.

data.title: Quanex Building Products declares $0.08 dividend
data.description:
• Quanex Building Products (NYSE:NX) declared $0.08/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 1.91%
  • Payable June 30; for shareholders of record June 16; ex-div June 16.
  • See NX Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Adial Pharmaceuticals files to register resale of 6.7M shares from warrant conversions
data.description:
• Adial Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ADIL) is registering up to 6.73M shares of common stock for resale by certain selling stockholders.
  • The shares include over 6.5M issuable from Series B-1 and C-1 warrant exercises and about 223,000 from "Tail Fee Warrants" issued to H.C. Wainwright designees.
  • Adial will not receive proceeds from resale of the shares but will benefit from any cash warrant exercises.
  • ADIL shares up 3.2% post-market on Friday.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: VSee Health faces Nasdaq non-compliance over delayed filings
data.description:
• VSee Health (NASDAQ:VSEE) received a Nasdaq notice of non-compliance for failing to file its quarterly and annual reports.
  • VSee has until June 24, 2025, to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq.
  • If accepted, Nasdaq may extend the deadline to regain compliance until October 13, 2025.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: TechTarget receives Nasdaq notice for delayed financial filings
data.description:
• TechTarget (NASDAQ:TTGT) was notified by Nasdaq on May 27, 2025, for failing to file its quarterly and annual reports.
  • The company is not in compliance with Nasdaq. TechTarget has until June 16, 2025, to submit a compliance plan to Nasdaq.
  • If the plan is accepted, the company may have until October 13, 2025, to file the delayed reports and regain compliance.
  • Source: Press release
